CustomField.label: Service
CustomField.description: Lookup (not Master-Detail) to VS_Service__c, denormalized off VS_Session__c for sharing/reporting convenience (design §2.3) -- lets dashboards/reporting filter appointments by service (e.g. which vaccine) without joining through Session. Lookup because Service is shared catalogue reference data that must never cascade-delete its bookings. Set by VS_BookingService.book() (VS-09) -- not defaulted or automated by this ticket. deleteConstraint=Restrict so a service with existing appointments cannot be deleted out from under its booking history.
